suppress.notes: CVE-2025-21199 affects com.microsoft.azure:applicationinsights-core. No patched version is available on Maven Central as of May 2026. Review when 3.7.9+ is released.
CVE-2026-33117 affects Azure SDK for Java (azure-core, azure-core-http-netty, azure-json). No patched version is available on Maven Central as of May 2026. Review when a patched release is published.
CVE-2026-33117 affects Azure SDK for Java. No patched version available as of May 2026.
CVE-2026-33117 affects Azure SDK for Java. No patched version available as of May 2026.

CVE-2026-23907 and CVE-2026-33929 affect Apache PDFBox 3.0.0-3.0.7. Fix requires 3.0.8 which is not yet available on Maven Central as of May 2026. Remove suppression once tika-parsers-standard-package is upgraded to a version bundling PDFBox 3.0.8+.

CVE-2026-33929 affects Apache PDFBox 3.0.0-3.0.7. Fix requires 3.0.8 which is not yet available on Maven Central as of May 2026. Remove suppression once tika-parsers-standard-package is upgraded to a version bundling PDFBox 3.0.8+.
